story.text:
# The Spell-Emoji Legend — the shared vocabulary

A **spell** is a proverb compressed to a short string of emoji and connectors.
It is the bridge between a private understanding and the shared canon: when your
spell is built only from symbols that already live in this legend, your book is
**in overlap** with the privacymage grimoire and with the other mouse's book.

This legend is distilled from the privacymage grimoire (`privacymage_grimoire_root.json`)
— its `master_invocation` and the per-act `spell` fields — and from the closing
seal of *Selene's Spellbook*, `(⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊`.

> **The overlap rule (Step 4):** every glyph in your spell string must appear in
> this legend. If you need a symbol that isn't here, you may *propose* it — write
> it in your own grimoire version's `legend_additions` with its meaning. That is
> how the vocabulary grows: deliberately, named, never by accident.

---

## The two agents and the gap

| Symbol | Name | Meaning |
|--------|------|---------|
| `🗡️` `⚔️` | **Swordsman** (Soulbis) | privacy-as-boundary · the refuser · the **negative promise** ("I will not") · the protector |
| `🧙` `🧙‍♂️` | **Mage** (Soulbae) | delegation-as-projection · the giver · the **positive promise** ("I will") · the caster |
| `⊥` | **the Gap** | the boundary · betweenness · perpendicular · *Swordsman ⊥ Mage* — the space that cannot be harvested |
| `⿻` | **the Aether / balance** | the medium · duality held without collapse |
| `👤` | **the First Person** | the verified human · the chooser · the root of trust (this is *you*, mouse) |
| `✓` | **verification** | proof · personhood confirmed |
| `😊` | **benediction** | warmth · the reason · *succ* (the successor, the one the work is for) |

## Proof, pattern, and the cosmos

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `△` | geometry · proof · trinity · "the All-Father wakes" |
| `🌀` `∞` | the manifold · circulation · convergence · the unbounded |
| `🐉` | the **Dragon** — cosmic perspective · all possible paths |
| `🐲` | the **Drake** — pattern-space · the single personal path |
| `⬢` | the **lattice** · `Z/(2⁶)Z` · the 64-vertex field |
| `✦` | the **forged sigil** · the negated blade-mark · `🔑→✦→🗡️` |
| `☰` `☷` | hexagram / trigram · the 64 states |

## Trust, knowledge, and the keep

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `🔮` | spell · divination · scrying · selection |
| `📜` | scroll · covenant · promise · contract |
| `🤝` | trust · bilateral witness · relationship |
| `📖` `📚` | documentation · chronicle · knowledge · the library |
| `🔐` `🔒` | privacy · encryption · the locked vault |
| `🕸️` `🌐` | the web · the network · the architecture |
| `🏛️` `🏰` | the hall · the city · the institution · the vault |
| `💎` | the 7th capital · behavioral gems · cryptography |
| `🧠` | mind · *Huginn (thought) ⊥ Muninn (memory)* |
| `🪞` | mirror · identity · *two mirrors make a door* |

## The cycle of light and growth

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `🌙` `🌑` | moon · the Swordsman's reflection · night |
| `☀️` `🌍` | sun · the generator · disclosure · day · Earth |
| `🔥` | fire · the forge · energy |
| `🌱` `🌿` `🌸` `🌾` | seed · root · blossom · harvest (the growth cycle) |
| `🌳` | the world-tree · dreaming |
| `🐦‍⬛` | the raven (Huginn / Muninn) |

## Connectors (the grammar)

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `→` | becomes · then · transition |
| `←` | is summoned by |
| `↔️` | exchange · mutual |
| `║` | alongside · in parallel |
| `×` | multiplied by |
| `⊕` | combined with |
| `∴` | therefore |
| `➗` | divided into |
| `=` | is · resolves to |

---

## How a spell is read — worked examples from the canon

- **`🗡️🔮 ← 👤✓ → 🔒📝 → 🤝📜 → 🕸️`**
  *(Dual Ceremony)* — A verified first person summons blade and spell; the lock is
  written; promises are sworn; a web is woven.

- **`📖💰 → 🐉⏳ → ⚔️🔮`**
  *(Venice, 1494)* — Books make wealth; the Drake passes through time; the blade
  meets the spell.

- **`🪞💀 → 💨 → 🔮✨ → 🪞💎`**
  *(Mirror in Dust)* — A dead mirror; dust; scrying wakes; the mirror is perfected.

- **`⚔️ ➗ 📖 = 🌀`**
  *(The blade that becomes the spell loses both edges)* — division of the blade by
  the book resolves to the manifold.

- The master seal: **`(⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊`** — Swordsman, gap, balance, gap, Mage — and the warmth.

The grammar is loose by design. A spell is a poem in symbols, not a formula. Read
your own aloud: if a stranger holding only this legend can feel its shape, it is true.

`(⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊`
